CREATE TABLE timestamps (utc_time DateTime64(3), time_zone String);
SELECT fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64('2023-03-16 10:00:00', 3), 'Asia/Tokyo') AS tokyo_time, fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64('2023-03-16 10:00:00', 3), 'Europe/Paris') AS paris_time;
SELECT fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64('2023-03-16 10:00:00', 3), time_zone) FROM (SELECT 'Asia/Kolkata' AS time_zone UNION ALL SELECT 'America/Los_Angeles' UNION ALL SELECT 'Australia/Sydney');
SELECT fromUTCTimestamp(t.utc_time, tz.time_zone) FROM timestamps AS t JOIN (SELECT 'Asia/Shanghai' AS time_zone UNION ALL SELECT 'Europe/Berlin') AS tz ON tz.time_zone != 'Europe/London';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM timestamps WHERE fromUTCTimestamp(utc_time, 'Asia/Shanghai') > now();
